entities.name: All of Who They Are vs a Slice Flattened Into Keywords
entities.context: Voice primitive expressing that people should be seen holistically, not reduced to keyword-matched data points

entities.name: Holistic Human Element
entities.context: The belief that a person's full identity, story, and capabilities matter — not just searchable attributes

entities.name: Reductionist Data Point
entities.context: Anti-pattern: flattening a person into keywords, skills lists, or resume line items

entities.name: Traditional Hiring Failure
entities.context: The systemic failure of conventional recruiting to capture who candidates actually are

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, founded on the premise that hiring should honor the whole person

entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: Source platform where this voice primitive was originally expressed

entities.name: Voice Primitives
entities.context: V's system for cataloging distinctive rhetorical patterns and conceptual frames for consistent external communication
